name: Prenatal Care Visit Codes
description: CPT codes for prenatal care visits including evaluation and management visits with pregnancy diagnosis context, routine obstetric care bundles, standalone antepartum care codes, and quality reporting codes for initial prenatal visits. Used in prenatal and postpartum care (PPC) measures for timeliness of prenatal care.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Office or other outpatient visit, new patient, level 1 (with pregnancy diagnosis context)

Routine obstetric care including antepartum care, vaginal delivery and postpartum care
Antepartum care only; 7 or more visits
Routine obstetric care including antepartum care, cesarean delivery, and postpartum care

Subsequent prenatal care visit, documented and target prenatal care visit in first trimester
